title: Power Generation and Distribution - Killingholme - geograph.org.uk - 1581068
description: Power Generation and Distribution - Killingholme. Killingholme Power Station owned by EON. This 900Mw station was the second gas-fired power station built in the UK and opened in 1993. Photo taken from public footpath.
author: David Wright
attribution_md:
Power Generation and Distribution - Killingholme - geograph.org.uk - 1581068
Power Generation and Distribution - Killingholme. Killingholme Power Station owned by EON. This 900Mw station was the second gas-fired power station built in the UK and opened in 1993. Photo taken from public footpath.
